segments.text: Intentionally breaking it down here too!
segments.original_text: あえて卵身ここでも崩す

segments.text: Now against the grab, with earlier startup—going for the bair drop from here!
segments.original_text: さあ今度は掴みに対して発生を先にここで空中後ろ落としから

full_text: Intentionally breaking it down here too! Now against the grab, with earlier startup—going for the bair drop from here!
